Here is the JSON output based on the provided image:

{
  "summary": "The image shows the cockpit displays of an F/A-18C. The left DDI is displaying the FCS page with various flight control systems and their status. The AMPCD is showing the HSI page with a map layer and INS alignment information. The right DDI is displaying the HUD with various flight information.",
  "facts": [

    },
    {
      "fact_id": "ins_grnd_alignment_text_visible",

      "evidence_note": "The GRND alignment block with QUAL and TIME/countdown text is visible on the HSI page."
